message.mac: Paste images onto your PDF — copy an image and press Cmd+V
message.windows: Paste images onto your PDF — copy an image and press Ctrl+V

message.mac: Master keyboard shortcuts — press ? to see all available shortcuts
message.windows: Master keyboard shortcuts — press ? to see all available shortcuts

message.mac: Clean up your workspace — press F for focus mode (hides toolbar and UI)
message.windows: Clean up your workspace — press F for focus mode (hides toolbar and UI)

message.mac: Select and copy text from your PDF — press 7 to activate text selection tool
message.windows: Select and copy text from your PDF — press 7 to activate text selection tool

message.mac: Rotate pages quickly — press R to rotate +90° or Shift+R to rotate -90°
message.windows: Rotate pages quickly — press R to rotate +90° or Shift+R to rotate -90°

message.mac: Precise erasing — hold Alt while using the eraser (key 2) for more granular control
message.windows: Precise erasing — hold Alt while using the eraser (key 2) for more granular control

message.mac: Add multiple images — paste as many images as you want on a single page with Cmd+V
message.windows: Add multiple images — paste as many images as you want on a single page with Ctrl+V
